nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: Spot-breasted lapwing
nodes.summary: Spot-breasted lapwing（Spot-breasted lapwing，学名 Vanellus melanocephalus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Found in both wet and dry montane habitats, including grassland, moorland, and marsh

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Found in both wet and dry montane habitats, including grassland, moorland, and marsh

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Very little information is know about its nesting habits. Due to climate change, and the acute vulnerability caused by being a confined endemic species, habitat loss is expected to be 86.6 percent or more by 2070
